chosen_key_names.groups.inviteAwaitingBanner: (groupName: string) => string — Invited-state banner. EN: "You've been invited to join {groupName}." DE: "Du wurdest eingeladen, der Gruppe {groupName} beizutreten."
chosen_key_names.groups.awaitingApprovalBanner: (groupName: string) => string — Awaiting-state banner. EN: "Waiting for the admin to approve your request to join {groupName}." DE: "Warte darauf, dass der Admin deine Anfrage zum Beitritt zu {groupName} genehmigt."

notes.key_shape_decision: Keys added as flat fields directly under groups.* (not nested under a new groups.inviteAwaiting sub-object like groups.pendingInvitations), because stories.json's seams[].contract.fields for GroupsInviteAwaitingCopy already commits to the flat field names groups.inviteAwaitingBanner / groups.awaitingApprovalBanner / groups.awaitingBadgeLabel / groups.cancelOutboundRequestLabel. Following that literal contract (rather than re-deriving a nested shape from the pendingInvitations precedent mentioned in the story prompt's Conventions section) keeps S3/S4 able to consume the exact paths already frozen in the seam.
notes.reuse_decision: No new 'Request to join' copy key was added; the existing groups.joinRequestButton key ('Request to Join' / 'Beitritt anfragen', i18n.ts lines 164/826/1390) is reused by S3's inline banner action per the story prompt's explicit instruction to check first.
notes.baseline_lint_typecheck: lint: NO_LINT (no ESLint config present in app/; `next lint` prompts to scaffold one interactively rather than running a check). typecheck: clean (npx tsc --noEmit, no errors) before and after this change.
